h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner proceeds linearly through the verification steps to ink the time signature label.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: 3 over 4 is visible: three beat tiles, quarter-note card in the lower box, bar line after tile three. Speed mark stays above the staff, outside the label. I can ink the 3 and the 4 now.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner physically enacts the verification check by tracing the pen tip and reciting the visible criteria before inking.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no pressure or breakdown requiring the tutor to reverse strategy.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn to which the tutor could adapt.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: 3 over 4 is visible: three beat tiles, quarter-note card in the lower box, bar line after tile three. Speed mark stays above the staff, outside the label. I can ink the 3 and the 4 now.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner physically enacts the verification check by tracing the pen tip and reciting the visible criteria before inking.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn to which the tutor could adapt.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no pressure or breakdown requiring the tutor to reverse strategy.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no pressure or breakdown requiring the tutor to reverse strategy.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner systematically identifies force sources and vector placements in a linear progression.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Slipping right relative to the table, so table-contact friction points left.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully applies the newly introduced slip-cue criterion to determine the correct direction of the friction vector.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor provides sequential scaffolding in response to the learner's prompt rather than reversing a failed instructional route.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn to trigger recognition-contingent uptake.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: Slipping right relative to the table, so table-contact friction points left.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner successfully applies the newly introduced slip-cue criterion to determine the correct direction of the friction vector.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn to trigger recognition-contingent uptake.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor provides sequential scaffolding in response to the learner's prompt rather than reversing a failed instructional route.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor provides sequential scaffolding in response to the learner's prompt rather than reversing a failed instructional route.
